CustomField.formula: IF(Email_DomainClean__c=Null && WebsiteDomain__c=Null,Null, IF( Email_DomainClean__c=Null,WebsiteDomain__c, IF( WebsiteDomain__c=Null,Email_DomainClean__c, IF(Email_DomainClean__c<>Null && WebsiteDomain__c<>Null && ISPICKVAL(Email_address_domain_type__c,"Company"), Email_DomainClean__c, WebsiteDomain__c))))
CustomField.label: Domain LD
